scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Requester
scopes.description: Can create, view own requests, and submit for approval

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Manager
scopes.description: Can view assigned requests and approve or reject them

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Finance
scopes.description: Can view and act on finance approval steps for high-value requests

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Admin
scopes.description: Full read access including audit logs and workflow instances

role-templates.name: Requester
role-templates.description: Role for employees submitting purchase approval requests

role-templates.name: Manager
role-templates.description: Role for managers approving requests between 1,000 and 5,000

role-templates.name: Finance
role-templates.description: Role for finance team approving high-value requests above 5,000

role-templates.name: Admin
role-templates.description: Role for administrators monitoring workflow state and audit trails

role-collections.name: Approval_Requester
role-collections.description: Grants access to submit and track purchase requests

role-collections.name: Approval_Manager
role-collections.description: Grants access to review and approve requests up to 5,000

role-collections.name: Approval_Finance
role-collections.description: Grants access to finance approval queue
